display.purpose: Principal headers and critical performance metrics.

mono.purpose: Trade logs, numeric values, timestamps, and parameters.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Strictly flat elevation with no ambient shadows.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for interactive state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button on parameters panel and dialogs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #eceefe; color: #151617; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #00f0ff; color: #0c0d0e; }

components.name: Sidebar Card
components.description: Flat bento grid container for settings and metrics panels.
components.html:
Strategy Parameters

Adjust model parameters and gates.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #151617; border: 1px solid #242528; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #eceefe; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #6b7280; margin: 0; }

components.name: Toggle Button Group
components.description: Segmented control for toggling between linear and logarithmic chart scales.
components.css: .ds-toggle-group { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #242528; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background: #151617; } .ds-toggle-btn { background: transparent; border: none; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; color: #6b7280; } .ds-toggle-btn.active { background: #00f0ff; color: #0c0d0e; }

narrative.overview: A sleek, dark, data-dense financial command center. The visual system prioritizes extreme contrast, structural flat layout alignment, and vibrant data-indicative accents (neon cyan and desaturated signal badging). The design is calibrated to convey institutional precision and analytical authority.
keyCharacteristics: High-Density Data: Information layout uses flat grids and compact borders instead of generous white-space padding.
Deep Monochromatic Surface: Built on absolute dark tones (#0c0d0e and #151617) to keep visual focus entirely on technical charts and metrics.
Utilitarian Details: Technical readouts, legends, and status indicators are rendered in sharp monospace text.

rules.name: The Accent Rarity Rule
rules.body: The neon cyan accent (#00f0ff) is strictly reserved for current state highlights and primary target buttons. It is never used for general decorations, large layout lines, or non-interactive headings.

rules.name: The Monospace Numeric Rule
rules.body: Every numeric table cell, chart coordinate, and trade parameter must use Geist Mono to prevent character-width shift and ensure precise vertical alignment.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Drop shadows and glassmorphic blurs are prohibited. Hierarchy is communicated exclusively by the border boundaries and background value contrast.

dos: Do align the three charts (BTC Price, Oscillator, and Cumulative Equity Growth) vertically with only a 1px separator border between them.
Do format all tabular numbers, trading percentages, dates, and metric readouts in Geist Mono.
Do maintain a strict 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all secondary and placeholder labels.
donts: Don't use ambient drop shadows or decorative glassmorphism blurs.
Don't add side-stripe accent borders to the bento cards or log cards.
Don't use saturated background colors for status badges (always use low-saturation pale alerts).
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections as general scaffolding.
